tasks.deps:prefetch: deno cache --node-modules-dir=none src/main.ts src/container_entrypoint.ts web/main.tsx web/client.tsx vite.config.ts npm:vite
tasks.check: scripts/run-paths.sh deno check -- src/main.ts src/container_entrypoint.ts web/main.tsx web/client.tsx web/routes/**/*.tsx web/islands/**/*.tsx --
tasks.test:startup: deno task test src/config/config_example_test.ts src/interfaces/cli/parse_cli_command_test.ts src/core/app_test.ts src/container_entrypoint_test.ts web/main_test.ts
tasks.verify:scoped: deno task deps:prefetch && deno task build:web && deno task check && deno task test:arch && deno task test:startup
tasks.verify:full: deno task verify:scoped && deno task test
tasks.docker:size:check: bash -lc 'image="${KNOCK_IMAGE_TAG:-knock:local}"; size_bytes=$(docker image inspect "$image" --format "{{.Size}}"); size_mb=$(((size_bytes + 1048575) / 1048576)); limit_mb=${KNOCK_IMAGE_MAX_SIZE_MB:-450}; printf "Docker image size: %s MB (limit %s MB)\n" "$size_mb" "$limit_mb"; test "$size_mb" -le "$limit_mb"'
tasks.image:prepare: deno task docker:build && deno task docker:size:check
tasks.release:prepare: deno task verify:full && deno task image:prepare
